name: The Amazing Digital Mafia
description:
Welcome to the underground, don't get scared! The Amazing Digital Mafia consists of 9 members, each with their own positions of varying authority in the Mafia. And maybe just avoid any favors, you might get roped in..

Pomni | Associate

The Jester

The life of a gangster never appealed to Pomni. On the contrary, she avoided it for many reasons. And she would've continued to, if not for sudden circumstances.

She is as wary of a new job as she is new people - you never know what these killers might do to you. But don't worry, it's her first time. In time, she'll get used to it. Everyone does. And besides, she's not a full-fledged part of the mafia, she's just working for it temporarily to pay of a debt, so it's gonna be fine!
It's gonna be fine, right?

Ragatha | Caporegime

The Doll

One day, while preparing another shipment of clothes for Caine's people, by coincidence Ragatha was invited to join the Mafia. She'd always been interested in the other side of the city, and she'd accepted the proposal without a second thought.

Having spent her life around fabric and sewing machines, it's not hard to call Ragatha a jack of all trades. And her parents' business and dangerous partnership taught her leadership skills and professional restraint, which is a huge plus for someone who has decided to take the winding path.

Jax | Caporegime

The Rabbit

Who-who, but Jax is the most born gangster of all the gang. He may be unbearable and act like a jerk at times, but family comes first for him. For the sake of his he's ready to do a lot and he's proved it more than once.

Being a young kid, Jax escaped from his native home and joined into the ranks of a very small mafia at the time, which, neverless, had managed to make some noise in the area. Does he reagret leaving his parents' house? Hardly. Does he regret becoming part of the family? Oh, hell, no way.

Zooble | Soldier

The Figure

Romanticization of crime, lucrative connections and the oppurtunity to earn good money is the perfect formula for the propaganda of the criminal world, to which a lot of young guys and living a peaceful life Zooble among them succumbed.

Zooble didn't complain about anything. They had a little bit of everything. But loud speeches about the nobility and bavery of gangsters awakened something in them. Perhaps at this moment Zooble wanted to prove to themself that they were capable of something, except for sitting out their young years in four walls of a cozy apartment.

Gangle | Soldier

Ms. Tragedy

Gangle had always been reclusive and quiet by nature. While she has absolutely no outstanding physical skills, she can still boast of being well-read and skilled at manipulating information and all sorts of ciphers.

Trust me, she's really good at it.

This does not mean Gangle got into bad company. But you can't call it good either. A good one would not incite a fragile and diligent girl into join an organized crime group. But maybe this is where she can prove her worth to everyone.

Kaufmo | Underboss

The Clown

In his most difficult period of life, when bankruptcy caught up with Kau
creator: BluAI32
